headline: Stop Sunday snacking, start catching up today
summary: Today you eliminate emotional snacking and add 30 minutes of rowing to close your 0.25kg weekly deficit gap.
details: Replace weekend snacking triggers with Huel meals today—no vegan junk food excuses. Row or run for 30-40 minutes before you settle into work mode; every workout today chips away at your 214-day deficit. Sunday is when you typically fail; today you prove discipline matters and catch back up.
